name: GPS Map
description: Geocoding e geolocalizzazione. Fornisce posizione home, coordinate e strumenti di mappa.

commands.get_home_location: Ottieni le coordinate lat/lon della posizione home dell'utente
commands.geocode: Geocodifica un indirizzo o città in coordinate lat/lon

function.name: MAP__get_home_location
function.description: Returns the geographic coordinates (lat/lon) of the user's home address. Use this when the user asks where they live, their home location, or to show their home on a map.

function.name: MAP__geocode
function.description: Converts a city name or address string into geographic coordinates (lat/lon). Use when you need to locate a place mentioned by the user.

query.description: Address, city name, or place to geocode (e.g. 'Rome, Italy', 'Via Roma 1, Milano')
